result.stdout:
USAGE:
    Git Profile Manager [OPTIONS] <COMMAND>

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help    Prints help information

COMMANDS:
    activate      Activates a profile
    deactivate    Deactivates a profile
    list          Lists available profiles
    profile       Commands for working with Git profiles

commands.payload:
USAGE:
    Git Profile Manager [OPTIONS] <COMMAND>

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help    Prints help information

COMMANDS:
    activate      Activates a profile
    deactivate    Deactivates a profile
    list          Lists available profiles
    profile       Commands for working with Git profiles

result.stdout:
USAGE:
    Git Profile Manager activate <PROFILE> [OPTIONS]

ARGUMENTS:
    <PROFILE>    The Git profile to activate or deactivate

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help      Prints help information
    -g, --global    Applies the profile globally, instead of the current repository

    Git Profile Manager list [OPTIONS]

OPTIONS:

result.stdout:
USAGE:
    Git Profile Manager profile [OPTIONS] <COMMAND>

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help    Prints help information

COMMANDS:
    create    Create a new (blank) profile
    import    Import a new profile from a command file or existing config
    delete    Delete an existing saved profile
    edit      Edit an existing profile to add or remove configuration items
    export    Export a saved profile to a command file
    show      Show configuration from a saved profile

commands.payload:
USAGE:
    Git Profile Manager profile [OPTIONS] <COMMAND>

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help    Prints help information

COMMANDS:
    create    Create a new (blank) profile
    import    Import a new profile from a command file or existing config
    delete    Delete an existing saved profile
    edit      Edit an existing profile to add or remove configuration items
    export    Export a saved profile to a command file
    show      Show configuration from a saved profile

result.stdout:
USAGE:
    Git Profile Manager profile create <PROFILE> [OPTIONS]

ARGUMENTS:
    <PROFILE>    The profile name

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help    Prints help information
        --from    An existing profile to base the new profile on (essentially duplicates the existing profile)

commands.payload:
USAGE:
    Git Profile Manager profile create <PROFILE> [OPTIONS]

ARGUMENTS:
    <PROFILE>    The profile name

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help    Prints help information
        --from    An existing profile to base the new profile on (essentially duplicates the existing profile)

result.stdout:
USAGE:
    Git Profile Manager profile delete <PROFILE> [OPTIONS]

ARGUMENTS:
    <PROFILE>    The profile name

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help               Prints help information
        --non-interactive    Do not prompt for user input or confirmations

commands.payload:
USAGE:
    Git Profile Manager profile delete <PROFILE> [OPTIONS]

ARGUMENTS:
    <PROFILE>    The profile name

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help               Prints help information
        --non-interactive    Do not prompt for user input or confirmations

result.stdout:
USAGE:
    Git Profile Manager profile edit <NAME> <CONFIG> [OPTIONS]

ARGUMENTS:
    <NAME>      The profile to add a new configuration to. Will be created if it does not exist
    <CONFIG>    The config value to add to the profile, separated by an '=' symbol

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help    Prints help information
    -r, --rm      Removes the given configuration item from the profile, instead of adding it

commands.payload:
USAGE:
    Git Profile Manager profile edit <NAME> <CONFIG> [OPTIONS]

ARGUMENTS:
    <NAME>      The profile to add a new configuration to. Will be created if it does not exist
    <CONFIG>    The config value to add to the profile, separated by an '=' symbol

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help    Prints help information
    -r, --rm      Removes the given configuration item from the profile, instead of adding it

result.stdout:
USAGE:
    Git Profile Manager profile export <PROFILE> <FILE> [OPTIONS]

ARGUMENTS:
    <PROFILE>    The profile name
    <FILE>       The path to export the profile to

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help    Prints help information

commands.payload:
USAGE:
    Git Profile Manager profile export <PROFILE> <FILE> [OPTIONS]

ARGUMENTS:
    <PROFILE>    The profile name
    <FILE>       The path to export the profile to

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help    Prints help information

result.stdout:
USAGE:
    Git Profile Manager profile import <FILE> [OPTIONS]

ARGUMENTS:
    <FILE>    A file of git commands to create a profile from

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help            Prints help information
    -n, --profile-name    Name of the profile to create. Defaults to the input file name
        --from-config     Read commands from config, rather than command file

commands.payload:
USAGE:
    Git Profile Manager profile import <FILE> [OPTIONS]

ARGUMENTS:
    <FILE>    A file of git commands to create a profile from

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help            Prints help information
    -n, --profile-name    Name of the profile to create. Defaults to the input file name
        --from-config     Read commands from config, rather than command file
